payload.answer: I could not save the article content because the URL fetch failed with a 404/network error. Please provide a working URL, title, or pasted article text if you want it remembered for memory architecture.

entity_resolution.reason: The article content could not be fetched; no reliable article entity or content facts can be resolved from a 404/network error.

details: No durable article memory was created because the article was not retrievable.
The stated reason was noted only in the failed-save context: useful for memory architecture.

repair_options: Provide a working URL for the article.
Paste the article text or summary to remember.
Provide the article title and source if the URL has moved.
